description: Style Note The inspiration for this kurta from folklore for women is the retro-esque fusion of the uniquely ethnic with smart work-wear. The label combines the quirky street style of India's biggest metros with classic silhouettes. This piece epitomises how fashion, vintage styling and comfort unite to create the perfect Indian look. Those interested in colour blocking can wear this with bright contrasting capris or pants. Others who want to keep their look classic and chic can pair this with tonal leggings, and embellished sandals Product DetailsWhite, pink and green printed kurta, has a mandarin collar with a split neckline, short sleeves with a velvet tape detail above the cuffs, mock chest placket, pin tucks and sequins on either sides of the placket with a cross stitch and split side seams Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash cold with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry inside out in shade Warm iron do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Regular The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
